aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: High but directionless

💼 Career: Kaam me rush hoga, par clarity missing ho sakti hai

❤️ Love: Impulsive words hurt kar sakte hain

💰 Money: Unplanned expense possible

🧘 Advice: Slow down and think

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Speed bina clarity chaos create karti hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable aur grounded

💼 Career: Consistent efforts se visible progress

❤️ Love: Emotional security strong hogi

💰 Money: Financial stability maintained

🧘 Advice: थोड़ा risk lena seekho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Safe game hamesha win nahi dilata
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Active but scattered

💼 Career: Multiple tasks overwhelm kar sakte hain

❤️ Love: Communication gap possible

💰 Money: Irregular flow

🧘 Advice: Focus ek jagah rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Too many directions = no real progress
cancer:
♋ Cancer

🔥 Energy: Emotional aur intuitive

💼 Career: Intuition सही guide karegi

❤️ Love: Deep emotional bonding

💰 Money: Safe planning best

🧘 Advice: Emotions ko balance karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Har feeling reality nahi hoti
leo:
♌ Leo

🔥 Energy: Confident aur magnetic

💼 Career: Leadership ka chance milega

❤️ Love: Passion high, par ego issue bhi

💰 Money: Bold decision profit de sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Listen more

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Sirf shine nahi, samajhna bhi zaruri hai
virgo:
♍ Virgo

🔥 Energy: Detail-focused but tense

💼 Career: Perfection delay create karega

❤️ Love: Overthinking distance la sakta hai

💰 Money: Stable

🧘 Advice: Let things flow

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Control ke chakkar me peace lose hota hai
libra:
♎ Libra

🔥 Energy: Social but confused

💼 Career: Teamwork se growth milegi

❤️ Love: Clarity zaruri hai

💰 Money: Balanced but average

🧘 Advice: Decision lo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Indecision bhi ek loss hai
scorpio:
♏ Scorpio

🔥 Energy: Intense aur focused

💼 Career: Strategic thinking se breakthrough

❤️ Love: Deep ya extreme reaction possible

💰 Money: Sudden gain ya shift

🧘 Advice: Control chhodo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Sab kuch control nahi hota
sagittarius:
♐ Sagittarius

🔥 Energy: Restless aur curious

💼 Career: New direction ka thought aayega

❤️ Love: Freedom vs commitment conflict

💰 Money: Risky move avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Discipline build karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Freedom bina focus waste hoti hai
capricorn:
♑ Capricorn

🔥 Energy: Productive aur steady

💼 Career: Efforts ka result clearly dikhega

❤️ Love: Stable but reserved

💰 Money: Strong financial growth

🧘 Advice: Emotions express karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Sirf kaam se life complete nahi hoti
aquarius:
♒ Aquarius

🔥 Energy: Creative aur unpredictable

💼 Career: Innovation highlight hoga

❤️ Love: Emotional disconnect feel ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Unexpected gain

🧘 Advice: Stay present

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Overthinking connection tod deta hai
pisces:
♓ Pisces

🔥 Energy: Dreamy aur sensitive

💼 Career: Creative flow strong

❤️ Love: Emotional clarity ya confusion

💰 Money: Stable but slow

🧘 Advice: Action lo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Sapne tabhi real bante hain jab tum kaam karte ho
